i tried REALLY hard to like her at first but seeing how she is and how she does her job overall just makes it hard… i don’t encourage to hate her or dislike her but if someone says they dislike her, i’d completely understand why. her teaching style is rather not effective on everyone. it bores everyone out cause she only ever reads powerpoints OR lets us watch a video online and then expect us to learn from it. what we students want is to learn stuff that is taught to us thoroughly, her way of teaching forces students to cram and memorize the lessons just because we have to for our grades, not because we understand it and can apply it to our daily lives. and i believe this isn’t the purpose of our payment for education. it just feels like she doesn’t put many thought in her powerpoints also, when she reads it and “explains” it, she just repeats what’s written on the powerpoint which causes people to not take her seriously. and from what i’ve been observing, i don’t even think she takes her own subject seriously because of the way she acts just because it’s tle. not to mention… she proposes quizzes UNINFORMED, without even teaching us a single thing also, when we tried to complain that we don’t know anything, she was upset for some reason.. i mean i would totally accept the surprise long quiz IF she taught us something that made sense to us but the problem is it doesn’t make sense to us and she barely teaches????

Kahit strikto ka at kahit pasaway at tamad ang tingin mo saming IT ginagalang pa rin kita, kasi di nun mababago na magaling ka magturo. Malawak ang knowledge mo sa subject dahil na rin sa experiences mo. Sana Sir magbago na tingin mo saming IT kasi di naman kami pare pareho saka nakaka baba rin ng self esteem. Siniguro ko na makakapagpasa ako ng online activities sayo di man maaga, di man on-time basta makapag pasa. Kasi gusto ko ang subject mo at kahit wala kaming internet dinudugasan ko nalang si mama ng pangload sa wifi. Nakakalungkot lang na ito na yung last na magiging teacher kita kasi PE lang naman hawak mong subject tapos nabitin pa dahil sa COVID. Thank you nalang sa lahat at take care Sir. Be Healthy nalang po always.

#InformationManagement
- This course taught me more about database management, and design, which are both important in business. I learned how to collect, store, analyze, and visualize data. I learned how to identify business functions, their entities, attributes, and entity relationships. Also, by creating an enhanced entity relationship diagram (EERD), and relational data model (RDM), I learned the major fundamentals of data modelling that must be learned in order to have a concrete representation of a business model. Finally, I learned how to use Structured Query Language (SQL) by using mySQL apps as a database application to transfer, and store data.

Hello po teacher Riza!

First off, wow you really blew me away for the methods you teach... You explain your lessons in a very detailed manner and I love the fact that you help some students who are having a hard time understanding the topic by breaking it down into smaller pieces or by simplifying it.

In all honesty and with no exaggeration intended, you are my ideal teacher, one who is strict about class rules, one who is patient to every one of the class, one who knows her boundaries and one who truly showed how tough the college life is going to be.

I mean to be fair you aren't really that strict no? You are just showing us that you are not some pushover of a teacher, and that for me, is the way you skyrocketed my respect for you. I know some teachers who just don't give a damn about their students not listening to their class which really gets me on my nerves. Don't get me wrong I know for certain that every teacher deserves the respect from us students but couldn't you at least prove to us that you really do deserve it? Again I'm talking about some teachers I know of, not you po teacher Riza, and oh boy you are the exact opposite of it. You really showed us your dominance and your strictness to us which I really liked. You showed to us all who is the boss and then preserved it till the very end... Well atleast in the 1st quarter but you know what I mean...

That's all I have to say really... Your pacing when it comes to teaching shows how fast and easy you can understand a single topic just by having a good teacher.

I don't really have any negative thoughts to say about you teacher Riza :) you are probably one of the best teachers I've had!
